Upcoming STEM Events

Robotics Night

Presented by Existing Org By Domain -- an evening of robotics fun for K-12 students at the downtown library.

Summer Coding Camp

Hosted by Existing Org By Name, a week-long coding camp for teens.

Maker Fair

Brought to you by Brand New STEM Org, hands-on maker projects for the whole family.

Space Camp

Run by Another New Org, a week of space science exploration for kids.
